item.title: WALLAC OY: GSP Neonatal GALT Kit. Product Codes: 3303-001U, 3303-0010. in vitro diagnostic. Used in FLUORESCENT PROC. (QUAL), GALACTOSE-1-PHOSPHATE URI Recall
item.product: GSP Neonatal GALT Kit. Product Codes: 3303-001U, 3303-0010. in vitro diagnostic. Used in FLUORESCENT PROC. (QUAL), GALACTOSE-1-PHOSPHATE URI
item.summary: Reduction in the on-board stability of the GSP GALT assay. This may increase the likelihood of run-QC failures and consequently delay the reporting of patient results. Product details: GSP Neonatal GALT Kit. Product Codes: 3303-001U, 3303-0010. in vitro diagnostic. Used in FLUORESCENT PROC. (QUAL), GALACTOSE-1-PHOSPHATE URIDYL TRANSFERASE.
item.affectedPeople: Worldwide - US Nationwide distribution in the states and territories of AL, AR, AZ, CO, FL, GA, IL, IN, KY, LA, MA, MD, MN, MO, NJ, OR, PR, SC, TN, TX, VA, WV and the countries of Austria, Belgium, Egypt, France, Germany, Hong Kong, Iraq, Italy, Netherlands, Oman, Philippines, Saudi Arabia, Singapore, Spain, Thailand, United Arab Emirates, Vietnam.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
